name: exedus__xen_take_next_turn
description: [Exedus (Xen core tools - 24 tools)] Long-poll up to 25s for the next voice turn. Each response bundles the turn {id,text,ts,source} WITH a fresh unified context snapshot (voice history + SMS/UI events from unified_context.jsonl + Xen stats). You receive live context automatically — no separate context call needed. Returns null on timeout.
